description: Configure a custom javascript bookmarklet named 'DDG Onion Pivot' on the Bookmarks Toolbar that extracts the current page's URL and submits it as a search query to the DuckDuckGo Onion service. Use the following code for the bookmarklet location: javascript:window.location.href='https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/?q='+encodeURIComponent(window.location.href);. Demonstrate the workflow by navigating to 'https://check.torproject.org/' and using the bookmarklet to search for that URL. Save the final DuckDuckGo Onion URL generated by the pivot to /home/ga/Documents/pivot_workflow_report.txt.
